LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeToxic.label: toxic gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeToxic.label: toxic gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeToxic.description: Releases a large cloud of a potent nerve agent harmful to most complex forms of organic life.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeToxic.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeToxic.verbs.0.label: throw toxic gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeRage.label: rage gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeRage.label: rage gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeRage.description: Releases a large cloud of a specialized airbone agent that induces a blind, uncontrollable rage..
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeRage.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeRage.verbs.0.label: throw rage gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeTearGas.label: tear gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeTearGas.label: tear gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeTearGas.description: Releases a large cloud of a specialized airbone agent that attacks the sensitive membranes of the eyes and nose, making it difficult to see or breathe..
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeTearGas.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeTearGas.verbs.0.label: throw tear gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeSleep.label: sleep gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeSleep.label: sleep gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeSleep.description: Releases a large cloud of powerful sedatives, capable of knocking unconscious anyone exposed to it.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeSleep.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeSleep.verbs.0.label: throw sleep gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeFear.label: fear gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeFear.label: fear gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeFear.description: Releases a large cloud of a specialized airbone agent that induces an extremely strong feeling of dread and terror.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeFear.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeFear.verbs.0.label: throw fear gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeAcid.label: corrosive gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAcid.label: corrosive gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAcid.description: Releases a large cloud of an extremely strong acid, capable of quickly burning flesh and metal alike.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAcid.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAcid.verbs.0.label: throw corrosive gas grenade
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeMechVirus.label: nanomachine canister
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeMechVirus.label: nanomachine canister
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeMechVirus.description: Releases a large cloud of nanomachines designed to latch onto and wreck havoc on the systems of mechanoids. Ineffective against organic life.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeMechVirus.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeMechVirus.verbs.0.label: throw nanomachine canister
LanguageData.Proj_GrenadeAntiBug.label: insecticide gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAntiBug.label: insecticide gas grenade
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAntiBug.description: Releases a large cloud of a special aerosol designed to kill insectoids.
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAntiBug.tools.0.label: Body
LanguageData.Weapon_GrenadeAntiBug.verbs.0.label: throw insecticide gas grenade
